        """Test config with custom styles including bold, italic."""

    words = ['ITALIC']
    style = { fg = "blue", italic = true }

        config_file = temp_files.create("style_config.toml", config)

    def test_follow_mode(tmux):
        # Create a dummy file
        log_file = "follow.log"
        with open(log_file, "w") as f:
            f.write("INITIAL_LINE\n")
            f.flush()
    
        try:
            # Run with --follow
            tmux.pane.send_keys(f"./executable --follow {log_file}", enter=True)
    
            assert tmux.wait_for("INITIAL_LINE")
    
            # Append to file
            with open(log_file, "a") as f:
                f.write("APPENDED_LINE\n")
                f.flush()
    
>           assert tmux.wait_for("APPENDED_LINE")
